scripts.build: cd Ynab && bun install && bun run build && rm -rf ../dist && cp -r dist ../dist
scripts.build:dev: cd Ynab && bun install && bun run build:dev && rm -rf ../dist && cp -r dist ../dist
scripts.android-deploy: cd Ynab && bun run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && cmd /c "set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr&& gradlew.bat assembleDebug && C:\Users\mathe\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe -d install -r app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk"
